name: Radiance Serum
description: A lightweight, fast-absorbing serum infused with Vitamin C and botanical extracts. Designed to brighten, even skin tone, and reveal your skin's natural radiance.
details: Our Radiance Serum combines 15% stabilized Vitamin C with rosehip seed oil and sea buckthorn extract. The formula is designed to penetrate deep into the skin, targeting dark spots and uneven tone while protecting against environmental stressors. Suitable for all skin types, this serum is your daily dose of luminosity.
howToUse: Apply 3-4 drops to cleansed face and neck morning and evening. Gently pat into skin until absorbed. Follow with your favorite Boty moisturizer. For best results, use consistently for 4-6 weeks.
ingredients: Aqua, Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C), Rosa Canina Seed Oil, Hippophae Rhamnoides Oil, Glycerin, Niacinamide, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Ferulic Acid, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Citrus Aurantium Dulcis Peel Oil, Lavandula Angustifolia Oil.
delivery: Free standard shipping on orders over $50. Express shipping available at checkout. All orders ship within 1-2 business days. Returns accepted within 30 days of purchase if product is unused and sealed.

name: Hydrating Serum
description: Hyaluronic acid moisture boost that delivers deep hydration for plump, supple skin.
details: Formulated with multi-weight hyaluronic acid to hydrate at every level of the skin. Lightweight and fast-absorbing, this serum locks in moisture for all-day comfort.
howToUse: Apply to cleansed face morning and evening before moisturizer. Pat gently until absorbed.
ingredients: Aqua, Sodium Hyaluronate, Glycerin, Panthenol, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Niacinamide, Tocopherol.
delivery: Free standard shipping on orders over $50. Express shipping available at checkout.

name: Age Defense Serum
description: Retinol & peptide complex that visibly reduces fine lines and wrinkles.
details: A powerful anti-aging formula combining encapsulated retinol with peptide technology. Reduces the appearance of fine lines while improving skin texture and firmness.
howToUse: Apply in the evening to cleansed skin. Start with every other night, building to nightly use. Always follow with SPF in the morning.
ingredients: Aqua, Retinol, Palmitoyl Tripeptide-1, Palmitoyl Tetrapeptide-7, Squalane, Glycerin, Tocopherol, Jojoba Esters.
delivery: Free standard shipping on orders over $50. Express shipping available at checkout.

name: Glow Serum
description: Niacinamide brightening boost that refines pores and evens skin tone.
details: 10% Niacinamide paired with zinc PCA to control sebum production, minimize pores, and brighten the complexion. Suitable for all skin types including sensitive.
howToUse: Apply 2-3 drops to cleansed face morning and evening. Follow with moisturizer.
ingredients: Aqua, Niacinamide, Zinc PCA, Glycerin, Hyaluronic Acid, Panthenol, Allantoin.
delivery: Free standard shipping on orders over $50. Express shipping available at checkout.

name: Hydra Cream
description: A rich yet lightweight moisturizer that delivers intense hydration without heaviness.
details: Hydra Cream features multi-weight hyaluronic acid to hydrate at every level of the skin. Shea butter and jojoba oil lock in moisture while squalane provides a silky, non-greasy finish. Perfect for normal to dry skin seeking lasting comfort.
howToUse: After cleansing and serum, apply a small amount to face and neck. Massage gently in upward motions. Use morning and evening as the final step of your skincare routine.
ingredients: Aqua, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil, Sodium Hyaluronate, Squalane, Glycerin, Cetearyl Alcohol, Calendula Officinalis Extract, Chamomilla Recutita Extract, Tocopherol.
delivery: Free standard shipping on orders over $50. Express shipping available at checkout.

name: Gentle Cleanser
description: A soothing botanical wash that removes impurities while respecting your skin's natural balance.
details: Our Gentle Cleanser uses coconut-derived surfactants that cleanse effectively without stripping. Enriched with chamomile, oat extract, and aloe vera, it calms and soothes as it cleanses. pH-balanced and dermatologist tested for sensitive skin.
howToUse: Wet face with lukewarm water. Apply a small amount to fingertips and massage onto face in circular motions. Rinse thoroughly. Use morning and evening.
ingredients: Aqua, Coco-Glucoside, Glycerin, Avena Sativa Kernel Extract, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Chamomilla Recutita Extract, Panthenol, Allantoin, Citric Acid, Benzyl Alcohol, Potassium Sorbate.
delivery: Free standard shipping on orders over $50. Express shipping available at checkout.

name: Night Cream
description: Restorative overnight treatment that works with your skin's natural renewal cycle.
details: A rich, nourishing formula designed for overnight repair. Ceramides strengthen the skin barrier while peptides support collagen production. Wake up to visibly refreshed, plumper skin.
howToUse: Apply generously to cleansed face and neck as the last step of your evening routine. For best results, use nightly.
ingredients: Aqua, Ceramide NP, Ceramide AP, Ceramide EOP, Palmitoyl Tripeptide-1, Squalane, Shea Butter, Jojoba Oil, Vitamin E.
delivery: Free standard shipping on orders over $50. Express shipping available at checkout.

name: Day Cream SPF 30
description: Protection & hydration in one lightweight formula with broad-spectrum SPF 30.
details: A daily moisturizer with mineral SPF 30 protection. Non-greasy, no white cast. Antioxidant-rich formula shields against environmental damage while keeping skin hydrated all day.
howToUse: Apply liberally as the last step of your morning skincare routine, 15 minutes before sun exposure. Reapply every 2 hours if outdoors.
ingredients: Aqua, Zinc Oxide, Titanium Dioxide, Squalane, Glycerin, Niacinamide, Vitamin E, Green Tea Extract.
delivery: Free standard shipping on orders over $50. Express shipping available at checkout.

name: Renewal Oil
description: A luxurious blend of precious botanical oils that deeply nourish and restore skin overnight.
details: Renewal Oil combines argan, rosehip, and marula oils with vitamin E for intensive overnight nourishment. This dry oil absorbs quickly, leaving skin soft without residue. Ideal for mature or dehydrated skin seeking restoration.
howToUse: Apply 4-6 drops to palms and warm between hands. Press gently onto face and neck as the final step of your evening routine. Can also be mixed with moisturizer for added hydration.
ingredients: Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil, Rosa Canina Seed Oil, Sclerocarya Birrea Seed Oil, Tocopherol, Rosa Damascena Flower Oil, Lavandula Angustifolia Oil, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil.
delivery: Free standard shipping on orders over $50. Express shipping available at checkout.

name: Rosehip Oil
description: Pure organic rosehip extract rich in vitamins A and C for skin renewal.
details: Cold-pressed from organic rosehip seeds, this oil is packed with essential fatty acids and antioxidants. Helps reduce the appearance of scars, fine lines, and hyperpigmentation.
howToUse: Apply 2-3 drops to face morning or evening. Can be used alone or mixed with moisturizer.
ingredients: Rosa Canina Seed Oil (100% Pure Organic).
delivery: Free standard shipping on orders over $50. Express shipping available at checkout.

name: Jojoba Oil
description: Balancing & lightweight oil that mimics skin's natural sebum.
details: Golden jojoba oil closely resembles your skin's natural oils, making it ideal for all skin types. Absorbs quickly without clogging pores. Great for face, hair, and body.
howToUse: Apply a few drops to face, hair ends, or body as needed. Excellent as a makeup remover or carrier oil.
delivery: Free standard shipping on orders over $50. Express shipping available at checkout.

name: Argan Oil
description: Luxurious Moroccan argan oil for face, hair, and nails.
details: Sourced from Morocco, this 100% pure argan oil is rich in vitamin E and fatty acids. Deeply moisturizes and restores elasticity. A true multi-tasker for your beauty routine.
howToUse: Apply 2-4 drops to face, hair, or nails. For hair, focus on ends to tame frizz and add shine.
ingredients: Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil (100% Pure Organic).
delivery: Free standard shipping on orders over $50. Express shipping available at checkout.

name: Glow Mask
description: Weekly brightening treatment that reveals smoother, more radiant skin.
details: A creamy kaolin clay mask infused with turmeric and vitamin C. Draws out impurities, refines pores, and leaves skin visibly brighter after just one use.
howToUse: Apply an even layer to clean, dry face avoiding eye area. Leave on for 10-15 minutes. Rinse with warm water. Use 1-2 times weekly.
ingredients: Kaolin, Curcuma Longa Root Extract, Ascorbic Acid, Aloe Vera, Glycerin, Honey Extract, Chamomile Extract.
delivery: Free standard shipping on orders over $50. Express shipping available at checkout.

name: Balance Toner
description: pH restoring mist that preps skin for better product absorption.
details: A gentle, alcohol-free toner with rose water and witch hazel. Balances skin's pH, tightens pores, and provides a refreshing spritz of hydration anytime.
howToUse: Spritz onto cleansed face or apply with a cotton pad. Use morning and evening before serums. Can also be used throughout the day for a refresh.
ingredients: Rosa Damascena Flower Water, Hamamelis Virginiana Water, Glycerin, Aloe Vera, Panthenol, Niacinamide.
delivery: Free standard shipping on orders over $50. Express shipping available at checkout.
